query:
ALTER TABLE orders 
ADD COLUMN deletedAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '软删除标记，null表示未删除',
ADD COLUMN deletedBy INT NULL COMMENT '删除操作人',
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_orders_deletedBy FOREIGN KEY (deletedBy) REFERENCES users(id);
